title: Viewer store for managing current artifact view state
purpose: Manages the state of the currently viewed artifact (document or diagram) in the viewer pane and provides navigation and reset functionality.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store with initial state set to null currentView and two actions: navigateToArtifact and reset.

steps.content: Update the store state to set the current view to the specified artifact ID and type.
Store the artifact type as either 'document' or 'diagram'.
Store the artifact identifier for the view.
Reset the current view state to null.
Clear the artifact identifier from the store.
Clear the artifact type from the store.
